title: Agentic Code Review
abstract: Agentic Code Review is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles the execution. Fix your code with a side of ...
abstract_zh: Agentic Code Review就像你的私人代码管家，你说“我要让这段代码飞起来”，它就能自动规划任务、调用工具，甚至给你来个高空翻转（multi-step workflows）！有了它，你只需设定目标，剩下的交给AI，顺便还能喝杯咖啡放松一下……嘿，说不定代码自己就飘上天了！
